summary: Completed testing of Iteration 13 - Purchase 1688 Orders Page & Webhook Security. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). The /purchase-1688 page has been successfully refactored from an Excel file upload interface to a data table that fetches and displays 1688 purchase orders from the backend API. Webhook security endpoints are working correctly with rate limiting, IP whitelist, and signature verification options.
critical_code_review_comments: Orders table displays all required columns: 1688 Order ID, Product, Qty, Size/Color, Shopify Order, Account, Status, Created, Actions
Status filter dropdown with data-testid='status-filter' works correctly
Shopify Order ID search with data-testid='search-shopify-id' filters orders correctly
View Details modal shows complete order information including API response
Refresh button with data-testid='refresh-orders-btn' reloads orders from API
GET /api/1688/purchase-orders endpoint returns orders with proper structure (alibaba_order_id, product_id, quantity, size, color, shopify_order_id, status, created_at)
Webhook security config endpoint returns: require_signature=false, rate_limit_requests=100, rate_limit_window_seconds=60
Webhook security stats endpoint tracks: blocked_by_ip, rate_limited, invalid_signatures, missing_signatures
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing 2 purchase orders in purchase_orders_1688 collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 features fully tested. The /purchase-1688 page now displays a table of 1688 purchase orders fetched from /api/1688/purchase-orders endpoint. The page shows: 1688 Order ID, Product ID, Quantity, Size/Color, Shopify Order, Account, Status, Created date. Status filter and Shopify Order ID search work correctly. Webhook security endpoints at /api/webhooks/fulfillment/security/config and /api/webhooks/fulfillment/security/stats are working. Currently 2 test orders exist in the database.

features_tested.1_purchase_1688_page_loads: PASS - Page loads at /purchase-1688 with correct title '1688 Purchase Orders'
features_tested.2_orders_table_displayed: PASS - Table with data-testid='orders-table' shows 2 orders
features_tested.3_table_headers_correct: PASS - Headers: 1688 Order ID, Product, Qty, Size/Color, Shopify Order, Account, Status, Created, Actions
features_tested.4_order_rows_displayed: PASS - 2 order rows with data-testid='order-row-0' and 'order-row-1'
features_tested.5_status_filter_works: PASS - Filter by status 'created' returns 2 orders
features_tested.6_shopify_search_works: PASS - Search by Shopify Order ID '29156' returns 1 order
features_tested.7_view_details_modal: PASS - Modal shows Order Details with all fields
features_tested.8_refresh_button_works: PASS - Refresh button reloads orders from API
features_tested.9_stats_cards_displayed: PASS - Shows Total Orders (2), Created (2), Paid (0), Shipped/Delivered (0)

api_verification_summary.GET /api/1688/purchase-orders: WORKING - Returns 2 orders with proper structure
api_verification_summary.GET /api/1688/purchase-orders?shopify_or: WORKING - Filters by Shopify order ID correctly

elements_verified: Subtitle: 'View and track all orders placed on 1688'
Stats cards: Total Orders (2), Created (2), Paid (0), Shipped/Delivered (0)
Order Details modal with Close and View on 1688 buttons
